summary: Show compliance information for a Purchase Order Contract
description: Return the compliance and insurance information for the specified contract. Includes any insurance documents for the vendor on this contract.

parameters.name: contract_id
parameters.description: identifier for the work order contract

updated_at.description: The last time the any of this compliance information was updated on this contract

updated_by_id.description: The last user who updated this compliance information

compliance_status.description: The compliance status of this contract

compliance_notes.description: Any notes about the compliance status

insurance_status.description: The insurance status of this contract

insurance_notes.description: Any notes about the insurance status

derived_insurance_status.description: A computed status based on the insurance documents for this contract's vendor. If all documents are compliant, this will be compliant. If any documents are not compliant, this will be not_compliant...

id.description: The identifier of the insurance record

name.description: The name of the insurance record

insurance_type.description: The type of the insurance record

level.description: Whether this insurance record is attached in the company or project directory

status.description: The compliance status of this insurance document

effective_at.description: The time which this insurance becomes effective. This time is the effective_date in the project or companies timezone converted to UTC.

expires_at.description: The time which this insurance expires. This time is the expiration_date in the project or companies timezone converted to UTC.

attachments.description: the files attached to this insurance record

derived_compliance_status.description: A computed status based on the compliance documents for this contract. If all documents are compliant, this will be compliant. If any documents are not compliant, this will be not_compliant. If the...

attachments.description: the files attached to this document

insurance_requirements_not_created.description: Insurance requirements that have conditions but are not yet created

id.description: The identifier of the insurance requirement

name.description: The name of the insurance requirement

level.description: The level of the insurance requirement

status.description: The status of the insurance requirement

compliance_requirements_not_created.description: Compliance requirements that have conditions but are not yet created

id.description: The identifier of the compliance requirement

name.description: The name of the compliance requirement

type.description: The type of the compliance requirement

status.description: The status of the compliance requirement
